steps.action: Reviewed server.go handler code for 4xx error paths
steps.expected: INVALID_REQUEST, MISSING_PARAMETER, INVALID_JOB_CONFIG (400), AUTH_FAILED (401), JOB_NOT_FOUND (404), JOB_CANNOT_CANCEL (400) all pass nil hint
steps.observed: Confirmed: All 4xx error calls in server.go pass nil as the hint parameter. Specifically: createJobHandler (INVALID_REQUEST, MISSING_PARAMETER, INVALID_REQUEST, INVALID_REQUEST, INVALID_JOB_CONFIG), getJobHandler (JOB_NOT_FOUND), deleteJobHandler (JOB_CANNOT_CANCEL), loginHandler (AUTH_FAILED)

steps.action: Reviewed auth.go respondWithError function behavior with nil hint
steps.expected: When hint is nil, respondWithError does not add retryable field to error.details
steps.observed: Confirmed: respondWithError only adds details when hint != nil. When hint is nil and no extra details are provided, error.details is absent from response

steps.expected: All 9 sub-tests pass: INVALID_REQUEST, MISSING_PARAMETER, INVALID_JOB_CONFIG, JOB_CANNOT_CANCEL, AUTH_FAILED, MISSING_TOKEN, INVALID_TOKEN_FORMAT, INVALID_TOKEN, JOB_NOT_FOUND
steps.observed: All 9 sub-tests PASS - verified that no retryable field is present in details for any 4xx error with nil hint

codeLocations: internal/server/server.go: createJobHandler, getJobHandler, deleteJobHandler - all pass nil hint for 4xx

steps.expected: MISSING_TOKEN, INVALID_TOKEN_FORMAT, INVALID_TOKEN all pass nil hint to respondWithError
steps.observed: Confirmed: authMiddleware calls respondWithError with nil hint for all three auth error cases: MISSING_TOKEN (empty Authorization header), INVALID_TOKEN_FORMAT (no Bearer prefix), INVALID_TOKEN (invalid/expired token)

summary: Tested 6 assertions: all 6 passed. Upstream errors (LOGIN_FAILED, COURSES_FETCH_FAILED, LECTURES_FETCH_FAILED at 502 with retryAfter=30, CANCEL_FAILED at 500 with retryAfter=10) correctly include retryable=true hints. Client errors (INVALID_REQUEST, MISSING_PARAMETER, INVALID_JOB_CONFIG, JOB_CANNOT_CANCEL, AUTH_FAILED, MISSING_TOKEN, INVALID_TOKEN_FORMAT, INVALID_TOKEN, JOB_NOT_FOUND) correctly omit retry hints (nil hint passed, no retryable field in response). All Go tests pass.
